refnamediv.refpurpose: Return the contour nearest to a seed point.

refsynopsisdiv.title: Syntax
refsynopsisdiv.synopsis: boundary = imbwtraceboundary(image, startPoint) boundary = imbwtraceboundary(image, startPoint, connectivity)

listitem.para: Binary or numeric 2D image. Nonzero pixels form the foreground components.
Two-element [x y] seed in upper-left-origin image coordinates.
Component connectivity, either 4 or 8. The default is 8.
Contour coordinates as an N-by-2 [x y] matrix using the upper-left image origin.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Labels the foreground using the requested connectivity, extracts its contours, and returns the contour having the point nearest to startPoint. Convert the returned coordinates with rect2cart before overlaying them with Scilab plotting functions.

refsection.title: Examples
refsection.para: Source reference: OpenCV contour extraction tutorial.
Example 1: Select one boundary from two distinct components
Example 2: Trace one selected object in a real image
